tools.name: get_recent_filings
tools.description: Get recent SEC EDGAR filings for any public company. Filter by form type (10-K annual, 10-Q quarterly, 8-K events, 4 insider trades, DEF 14A proxy).

tools.name: get_insider_trades
tools.description: Get insider trading activity from SEC Form 4 filings. Shows when executives and directors buy or sell company stock — a key alpha signal for trading agents.

tools.name: get_earnings_data
tools.description: Get structured financial data from SEC XBRL filings. Returns revenue, net income, EPS, assets, and more with historical data and YoY growth.

tools.name: get_material_events
tools.description: Get Form 8-K material event filings — M&A announcements, CEO changes, earnings releases, and other events requiring immediate SEC disclosure.

tools.name: get_fda_data
tools.description: Get FDA drug recalls and adverse event reports from openFDA. Search 17,000+ recalls and 20M+ adverse events by drug name or company.
